title: The end of the “settlement exit”? — The stricter Section 12A regime post-2026 amendment
description: The old game: How Section 12A became a LoopholeFor nearly eight years, the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 (IBC) carried within it a quiet contradiction. On the one hand, it was designed to be a serious, time-bound, collective resolution mechanism and a creditor-driven process. On the other hand, it contained Section 12A, a provision that became one of the most strategically exploited exits in Indian commercial law.Section 12A was inserted by the Second Amendment Act, 2018 on the recommenda
